# harvester_kubeovn_switch_lb_rule (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harvester_kubeovn_switch_lb_rule" "example" {
  name = "example-slr"
  vip  = "example-vip"

  ports {
    name     = "http"
    port     = 80
    protocol = "TCP"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name
- `ports` (Block List, Min: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--ports))
- `vip` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `endpoints` (List of String)
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `rule_namespace` (String)
- `selector` (List of String)
- `session_affinity` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `status_ports` (String)
- `status_service` (String)

<a id="nestedblock--ports"></a>
